ui.title: Open Chat
ui.welcomeMessage: How can I help you today?
ui.welcomeSubtitle: I'm an AI assistant ready to help with coding, writing, analysis, and more.

examplePrompts.title: Help me code
examplePrompts.prompt: Can you help me write a React component that displays a sortable data table?

examplePrompts.title: Summarize text
examplePrompts.prompt: Can you summarize the key points from a document I'll paste?

examplePrompts.title: Brainstorm ideas
examplePrompts.prompt: I need creative ideas for a mobile app that helps people learn new skills.

examplePrompts.title: Write content
examplePrompts.prompt: Help me write a professional email to follow up after a job interview.
